title: Mario Kart 64: Rainbow Road //Tachin1994 Remix//
description:
The worst rainbow road in track terms... but in music... oh it's sublime.

I've allways wanted to give this song a shot. And well, I did something!

There's a lot of remixes that i haven't uploaded/ finished, so I will upload them between my "videos" (I accept requests)

Made using KORG M01D (3DS) and Mixcraft 7, all by ear ;).

MP3: https://soundcloud.com/tachin1994/mk64-rainbow-road-remastered

Disclaimer: I ain't own any shit.
Footage used:
-Gurk Gamer: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eJF-u9xWIH8
-OathkeeperSoraXIII: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cbkxvxMPRnU

Enjoy the video, and give credit ;)

(...please ignore the post-rendering bugs, I really need to move to another video editor... also, the song itself is the most important.)
